title_original: QCentroid makes NVIDIA CUDA-Q available in its QuantumOps Platform to accelerate enterprise hybrid quantum adoption - QCentroid
summary_original: QCentroid, based in Bilbao, Spain, has integrated NVIDIA CUDA-Q into its QuantumOps platform, announced on March 16, 2026. This move enables enterprises to develop, benchmark, and manage hybrid quantum-classical workflows using GPU-accelerated simulations alongside quantum backends. The integration promises streamlined experimentation, traceability, and repeatable benchmarking, all critical for organizations in the “pre-quantum advantage” era. QCentroid, part of the NVIDIA Inception program since 2024, also introduces an AI Copilot layer that quickly converts workflow exploration into use-case packs. CEO Carlos Kuchkovsky emphasized the importance of repeatable, credible benchmarking for enterprise adoption, while Sam Stanwyck of NVIDIA highlighted the need for true hybrid environments to advance quantum-GPU supercomputing.
